HTML template for task execution, Flask app initialization, Celery tasks, and route definitions.

## Folders
- **[templates](templates/README.md)**: HTML template for executing and displaying results of background tasks using Celery and JavaScript.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initializes a Flask application with Celery integration for task management and routing.
- **[tasks.py](tasks.py.md)**: Celery tasks for addition, blocking, and progress-tracking operations.
- **[views.py](views.py.md)**: Defines Flask routes for task management and result retrieval using Celery.
